name: Petite Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 package Knorr cream of leek soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow cheese and butter to soften.
2. Cream together with hands to blend well.
3. Work flour into the mixture.
4. Pinch off small balls of pastry; press into petite cupcake pans.
5. Filling: Bring soup and milk to a boil; cool slightly. Stir in cream. Cool.
6. Beat eggs with remaining ingredients; add to soup.
7. Fill pastry cups.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 30-35 minutes. Makes 4 dozen. Double pastry for 8 dozen. There is plenty of filling. Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" busted by Judy R.
